_meta._note: BIA's declarative-gen-ui agent (showcase/integrations/built-in-agent/src/lib/factory/a2ui-factory.ts) runs a two-call sequence per pill: (1) outer agent emits a `generate_a2ui` toolcall with a single `brief` string arg; (2) the tool body invokes a SECONDARY LLM (no tools, response_format=json_object) seeded with the catalog system prompt and the brief, which must return a flat A2UI catalog JSON object {surfaceId, catalogId, components, data}; (3) the outer agent emits a short narration after the tool result returns. Each pill therefore needs THREE fixtures: outer turn1 (hasToolResult:false, emits `generate_a2ui` with `{brief}`); secondary call (responseFormat:json_object + userMessage matches the brief substring, emits the flat-catalog JSON as content); outer turn2 (hasToolResult:true, emits narration). Components MUST use the flat catalog shape {id, component, ...catalog-props-at-top-level} per myDefinitions (showcase/integrations/built-in-agent/src/app/demos/declarative-gen-ui/a2ui/definitions.ts); Card has a single `child` slot so multi-child layouts wrap in a basic-catalog Column. PieChart/BarChart props require `title`, `description`, and `data[]`. D5 asserts these testids mount: declarative-card, declarative-status-badge, declarative-metric, declarative-pie-chart, declarative-bar-chart.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative kpi-dashboard pill — outer agent emits generate_a2ui with a brief.

toolCalls.name: generate_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"brief":"KPI dashboard with revenue, signups, and churn metrics for the last 30 days"}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative kpi-dashboard pill — secondary LLM (json_object) emits flat A2UI catalog. Card has single `child` slot; wrap the three Metrics in a basic-catalog Column.

match.userMessage: KPI dashboard with revenue, signups, and churn metrics

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative kpi-dashboard pill — outer agent narration after tool result.

response.content: KPI dashboard rendered with revenue, signups, and churn metrics.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative pie-chart pill — outer agent emits generate_a2ui with a brief.

match.userMessage: pie chart of sales by region

toolCalls.name: generate_a2ui
toolCalls.arguments: {"brief":"pie chart showing sales by region across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific"}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative pie-chart pill — secondary LLM emits flat A2UI catalog with PieChart root.

match.userMessage: pie chart showing sales by region

response.content: {"surfaceId":"sales-pie","catalogId":"declarative-gen-ui-catalog","components":[{"id":"root","component":"PieChart","title":"Sales by Region","description":"Q4 — share of total revenue","data":[{"label":"North America","value":45},{"label":"Europe","value":30},{"label":"Asia Pacific","value":25}]}],"data":{}}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-declarative pie-chart pill — outer agent narration after tool result.

match.userMessage: pie chart of sales by region

response.content: Pie chart rendered showing sales distribution across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific.
